fields.name: Description
fields.default:
Each block combines a Handlebars template, Tailwind styling, and a set of fields. The fields become the editing interface your clients see.

It's just HTML. If you know HTML, you're 90% there. Alpine.js and HTMX are included but optional.

default.title: Template
default.body: Handlebars + Tailwind. Semantic classes that inherit the theme. No proprietary syntax to learn.

default.title: Fields
default.body: Text, images, links, repeaters. Fields define what's editable -- and what's protected.

default.title: Theme
default.body: 10 colors, 8 type tiers, 4 button variants. Change the theme, every block adapts instantly.

fields.name: Theme Description
fields.default:
Semantic tokens make blocks portable across projects. Build a block library over time -- every new project starts with everything you've already built.

Not too many tokens, not too few. Carefully curated so designs stay consistent without being restrictive.
